title: Silver Bullet Myth That's Killing Your Funded Account (2026)
description: Stop using the Silver Bullet setup wrong. Most traders enter at the wrong time and blow their accounts before lunch. The R2F Trading system breaks down the REAL Silver Bullet rules in under 35 seconds. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups, order block breakdowns, and funded trader strategies. #SilverBullet #ICTTrading #SmartMoneyConcepts
script: Stop trading Silver Bullet like this. I see funded accounts blown every single day because of this one myth. The myth? You can trade Silver Bullet any time between 10 AM and 11 AM. Wrong. Completely wrong. That window has THREE specific entry conditions. Most traders skip all three. Then wonder why they fail. Here's the truth. Silver Bullet needs a liquidity sweep first. No sweep — no trade. Period. Then price fills a fair value gap. THEN you enter. That sequence protects your drawdown 80% more effectively. The R2F Trading system has refined this over 10 years. Sequence matters more than the setup itself. Follow R2F Trading. Daily ICT setups that actually get you funded. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
